Detailed Description

Input Channel Systems - SPI
System ID: 0x48 through 0x4f

+----------------+------+-------------+----------+--------+---------+---------------------------------------+
| Register Name  | Id   | Type        | Unit     | Range  | Default | Comment                               |
+================+======+=============+==========+========+=========+=======================================+
| input          | 0x01 | uint 32-bit | None     | 0 to 5 | 0       | For both channel. See registers table |
+----------------+------+-------------+----------+--------+---------+---------------------------------------+
